errors.taken: That email or username is already taken.

persona.heading: How will you use BiBoTracking?
persona.justMeDesc: Track my own activity & performance. Stays 100% on my computer.
persona.teamDesc: Manage employees or freelancers and review their activity.
persona.familyDesc: Keep an eye on my kids' screen time & activity.
persona.caption: ⓘ "Just me" downloads the app and runs offline — nothing is uploaded.

personal.heading: Personal tracking is local-only
personal.sub: Nothing to sign up for. Download the app and everything stays on your computer — no account, no cloud.
personal.caption: Already installed? Just open the app and pick "Just me".

account.title: Create your account
account.sub: Get the most out of BiBoTracking.
account.name: Your name

members.title: Add your {{members}}
members.sub: Each {{member}} gets a login — a username (no email needed) or their email. We pre-fill a username and a temporary password; share them, and the {{member}} can change the password after signing in. You can also do this later from the dashboard.
members.name: Name
members.countAdded: {{count}} {{members}} added — copy each login and share it.
